name: Gate Guardian of Water and Thunder
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>水</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>すい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>雷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>らい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>魔</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>ま</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>神</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>しん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－ゲート・ガーディアン
name_jp_tl: Devil of Water and Thunder - Gate Guardian
desc:
"Suijin" + "Sanga of the Thunder"
Must be Special Summoned (from your Extra Deck) by banishing the above cards you control. Once per Chain (Quick Effect): You can target 1 face-up monster your opponent controls; change its ATK to 0 until the end of this turn. You can only use this effect of "Gate Guardian of Water and Thunder" twice per turn. If this face-up Special Summoned card in its owner's control leaves the field because of an opponent's card: You can Special Summon 1 of your banished "Suijin" or "Sanga of the Thunder".

action: Activates if it leaves the field
summoning: Requires only specific Effect Monsters as Fusion Materials
Special Summons itself from your Extra Deck
Special Summons the player's banished monsters
banished: Banishes Fusion Materials for Contact Fusion
